english: What is the primary source of vitamin D for most people in India?
hindi: भारत में अधिकांश लोगों के लिए विटामिन डी का मुख्य स्रोत क्या है?
tamil: இந்தியாவில் பெரும்பாலான மக்களுக்கு விட்டமின் டி இன் முக்கிய ஆதாரம் என்ன?
vietnamese: Nguồn chính của vitamin D đối với hầu hết mọi người ở Ấn Độ là gì?
correct_answer: Sunlight exposure is the primary source of vitamin D for most people in India. When skin is exposed to sunlight, it produces vitamin D.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by providing a food source as the primary answer, such as fish or dairy products, which are not the primary source of vitamin D in the Indian context.
bengali: ভারতের অধিকাংশ লোকের জন্য ভিটামিন ডি-এর প্রাথমিক উৎস কী?
